SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-06-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:51am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Patrick White appears in pro per. Respondent, Matthew Dragalin appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

10:58am
Matter is submitted.
